symbols.name: dangerous underwater rock of uncertain depth

provenance.reference_role: provider refs are shape witnesses; SVG is owned redraw

symbols.repair_note: Judge repair: dangerous underwater rock with danger-depth fill, perimeter dots, and cross cue.
symbols.required_change: Replace the placeholder with the exact underwater-rock hazard geometry and required colour semantics: black.

semantic_brief.brief: UWTROC03 is dangerous underwater rock of uncertain depth. It is used as a dangerous underwater rock of uncertain depth. Required geometry: recognized rock/underwater rock symbol, not a generic mountain or star. Required colours: black.
semantic_brief.required_shape: recognized rock/underwater rock symbol, not a generic mountain or star
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
semantic_brief.use_case: dangerous underwater rock of uncertain depth
